title: ISMB
description: International conference on Intelligent Systems for Molecular Biology
note: Held jointly with European Conference on Computational Biology (ECCB) in odd years. Odd-year papers are published in Bioinformatics journal supplements.

2011.note: ISMB/ECCB 2011 (odd year, joint with ECCB). Papers in Bioinformatics journal supplement. 73 papers recovered. Anchor: nr13.

2013.note: ISMB/ECCB 2013 (odd year). Papers in Bioinformatics journal supplement. 66 papers recovered. Anchor: nr13.

2015.note: ISMB/ECCB 2015 (odd year). Papers in Bioinformatics journal supplement. 71 papers recovered. Anchor: nr12.

2017.note: ISMB/ECCB 2017 (odd year). Papers in Bioinformatics journal supplement. 81 papers recovered. Anchor: nr14.

2019.note: ISMB/ECCB 2019 (odd year). Papers in Bioinformatics journal supplement. 102 papers recovered. Anchor: nr14.

2021.note: ISMB/ECCB 2021 (odd year). Papers in Bioinformatics journal supplement. 55 papers recovered. Anchor: nrSupplement1.

2023.note: ISMB/ECCB 2023 (odd year). Papers in Bioinformatics journal supplement. 61 papers recovered. Anchor: nrSupplement-1.

2025.note: ISMB/ECCB 2025 (odd year). Bioinformatics journal supplement not yet available.
